stage_analysis.logic_used: Dominant stage chosen by highest own-stage score. Dominant substage chosen by highest substage score within dominant stage.

strengths: Stable operational foundation supports execution even during change.
Strong alignment with business goals helps keep focus.
Stakeholder trust provides support during transitions.
weaknesses: Resistance to change may reduce speed of response.
Too much dependency on current workflows can block improvements.
Prioritization gaps may reduce efficiency during multiple challenges.
opportunities: Improve agility by modernizing processes and planning systems.
Use emerging challenges as a platform for innovation and upskilling.
threats: Rapid market changes can disrupt stability if not handled early.
Competitors may adapt faster and gain advantage.
Miscommunication during change can reduce trust and morale.

actions.title: Risk & Impact Review
steps: Identify top 3 current challenges impacting performance.
Finalize the top 1 challenge to solve first.

actions.title: Prioritize & Execute
steps: Use Impact vs Effort matrix to pick solutions.
Run a small pilot before full rollout.
Track results weekly using a simple metric dashboard.

actions.title: Communication & Alignment
steps: Communicate clearly why the change is needed.
Take short feedback loops from team & stakeholders.

final_output_summary.one_line_summary: The candidate is stable in execution (Steady-State) but facing emerging operational challenges that require proactive planning and agile improvements.
recommended_focus_next_14_days: Solve 1 major challenge using pilot-based approach.
Improve prioritization system and ownership clarity.
Communicate changes consistently to avoid confusion.
